examples: When you create a Macro and name it AutoExec, it's the very first thing that will run (even before the form you have set as your main form).
SYS and AUTOEXEC. BAT files for running the device communication software, and how to solve some problems while using CD ROM retriveal systems (for HITACHI drives).
This trick might help: Compare the commands in the floppy's config.sys and autoexec.bat files.
